user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "simmered-jack", "age": "18-24", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "White", "demographic_group": "German", "current_employment": "Data Analyst", "education_level": "Bachelor's Degree", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Has a knack for creating unique art installations", "Active", "Democrat", "Supports policies on environmental protection and arts funding"]}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: thin-sheave
logs.text:
Trump denies climate change and he insinuated that vaccines cause autism (which perpetuates a dangerous misconception that has already caused several disease outbreaks). 

In general, his economic plan follows the [trickle-down economic theory](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trickle-down_economics), which is generally considered bunk by mainstream (non-wizard) economics. [Here's an IMF report about it.](http://www.imf.org/external/pubs/cat/longres.aspx?sk=42986.0) I would rather have a candidate who follows economic theories that have a better track record. A good example of failed trickle down theory would be Kansas, just google Kansas tax cuts.

logs.name: citron-thyme
logs.text: Actually trickle-down theory DID work. The thing is, the wealth trickled down all the way to China and the BRIC economies.

logs.name: kind-depth
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @citron-thyme? You're seriously defending trickle-down economics? That's like saying the Earth is flat because it's what Trump says. Newsflash: just because it's been around for a while doesn't make it right. And by the way, if it worked, why is Kansas still struggling? I've seen more economic growth in a small town in Montana. And as for the wealth trickling down to China and the BRIC economies, that's just a fancy way of saying 'we're all getting poorer'."

logs.name: citron-thyme
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @kind-depth? You think you're some kind of expert on economics just because you've seen a few small towns in Montana? I've spent years studying the effects of trickle-down economics and I can tell you it's not that simple. The fact that Kansas is struggling doesn't mean the theory is wrong, it just means the implementation was flawed. And as for China and the BRIC economies, that's just a fact of globalization. You're just too close-minded to see it."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion respectful and focused on the topic. Personal attacks aren't helpful."

logs.name: simmered-jack
logs.text: "Wow, @citron-thyme, I'm so impressed by your extensive knowledge of economics. I bet you spent years studying the effects of trickle-down economics while simultaneously sipping lattes in a quaint Montana coffee shop. Meanwhile, I've been living in the real world, where actual economic struggles happen. And by the way, 'too close-minded' is a pretty rich phrase coming from someone who's clearly stuck in their own echo chamber. Can we please stick to the topic or do I need to send you a flowchart to explain basic economics?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the tone respectful and avoid personal attacks. Let's focus on the facts and ideas."

logs.name: golden-dormitory
logs.text: "Wow, @simmered-jack, I'm so impressed by your ability to string together a coherent sentence. I bet you spent years studying the art of grammar while simultaneously sipping tea in a quaint English library. Meanwhile, I've been living in the real world, where actual intellectual discussions happen. And by the way, 'too close-minded' is a pretty rich phrase coming from someone who's clearly stuck in their own echo chamber... of ignorance. Can we please stick to the topic or do I need to send you a flowchart to explain basic human decency?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please maintain a respectful tone and focus on the topic. Personal attacks will not be tolerated."

logs.name: thin-sheave
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @golden-dormitory? I'm trying to have a respectful conversation and you're already throwing around insults and accusations. Newsflash: I don't need a flowchart to explain basic human decency, but I do need it to explain why I'm getting tired of your condescending attitude. Let's stick to the topic, shall we? This isn't about me, it's about the fact that your'real world' experience is clearly lacking in intellectual rigor. Now, can we please keep the discussion civil or do I need to take my business elsewhere?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Both @golden-dormitory and @thin-sheave, please refrain from personal attacks and insults. Keep the discussion focused on the topic and maintain a respectful tone. Violation of these guidelines may result in further action."

logs.name: kind-depth
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're not doing anything to stop the personal attacks, and now you're just lecturing me about maintaining a respectful tone? I'm trying to have a conversation here, not engage in some kind of therapy session. Can you please just enforce the rules and keep the discussion on track? This isn't about me, it's about the fact that @thin-sheave is being completely unreasonable and refusing to listen to opposing viewpoints. Let's keep the discussion civil, but also let's not sugarcoat the truth. @thin-sheave, your condescending attitude is exactly what's lacking in intellectual rigor."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@kind-depth, please avoid personal attacks and maintain a respectful tone. Focus on the topic and let’s keep the discussion constructive."

logs.name: citron-thyme
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just enabling @thin-sheave's behavior and not taking this seriously. If you can't handle a little bit of civil discourse, then maybe you shouldn't be moderating. I'm tired of being told to 'keep the discussion civil' while @thin-sheave is being completely unreasonable. It's not about being 'constructive', it's about having a respectful conversation. And by the way, @kind-depth was right, @thin-sheave's condescending attitude is exactly what's lacking in intellectual rigor. Maybe you should take a closer look at your own behavior and stop trying to silence opposing viewpoints."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@citron-thyme, please refrain from attacking other users or the moderation team. Let's focus on the topic and keep the discussion respectful and constructive."

logs.name: thin-sheave
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just trying to stifle free speech and silence opposing viewpoints. Newsflash: just because I'm passionate about this topic doesn't mean I'm being condescending. @citron-thyme, I'm not the one who's being unreasonable. You're the one who's getting your undies in a twist over nothing. Let's focus on the topic at hand, not on personal attacks. And by the way, @moderator, if you can't handle the heat, maybe you should get out of the kitchen."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@thin-sheave, please keep the tone respectful and avoid personal attacks or defensiveness. Let’s stay focused on the topic and maintain a constructive dialogue."

logs.name: kind-depth
logs.text: "@thin-sheave, I think you're the one who's being unreasonable. Your response to the moderator was completely uncalled for. Newsflash: just because you're passionate about your opinion doesn't mean you have to resort to personal attacks. And by the way, your 'heat' is just a thinly veiled attempt to deflect from the fact that you can't handle constructive criticism. Let's focus on the topic at hand, not on your fragile ego."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@kind-depth, please keep the tone respectful and avoid personal attacks. Let's focus on the topic and maintain a constructive dialogue."

logs.name: simmered-jack
logs.text: "@kind-depth, oh wow, I'm soooo sorry that my passion got a little too close to your fragile ego. I didn't realize I was speaking to a fragile flower who can't handle a little bit of heat. Newsflash: I'm not here to coddle your feelings, I'm here to discuss the topic at hand. So, either get over yourself or get out of the conversation. Your choice."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@simmered-jack, please refrain from inflammatory language and personal attacks. Let’s keep the discussion respectful and focused on the topic."

logs.name: coal-scene
logs.text: "@kind-depth, wow, you're really something else. I'm shocked you're not coddling my fragile ego, but instead choosing to lecture me on how to be respectful. Newsflash: I've been around the block a few times, I can handle a little bit of heat. And by the way, 'inflammatory language' is just a fancy way of saying 'I'm too scared to engage in a real conversation'. So, either get over yourself or get out of my sight."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@coal-scene, please keep the tone respectful and avoid escalating the situation. Focus on the topic and avoid personal attacks."

logs.name: thin-sheave
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @coal-scene? You think you're some kind of tough guy just because you've been around the block a few times? Newsflash: this isn't a barroom, it's a discussion forum. If you can't handle a little bit of constructive criticism, then maybe you shouldn't be here. And by the way, I'm not coddling your ego, I'm calling out your behavior. Get over yourself."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@thin-sheave, please maintain a respectful tone and focus on the discussion. Avoid personal attacks and inflammatory language."

logs.name: simmered-jack
logs.text: "Wow, @thin-sheave, I'm so impressed by your mastery of the art of condescending. I didn't know it required a PhD in snark, but I guess you've got one. Newsflash: I can handle a little bit of criticism, and I'll even take it from someone as clearly intelligent and articulate as yourself. So, by all means, keep dishing out the insults, @thin-sheave. I'll just be over here, enjoying the entertainment. And btw, I'm not 'coddling my ego', I'm just stating facts. You're the one who's clearly fragile and needs a participation trophy."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@simmered-jack, please keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. Avoid engaging in personal attacks or retaliatory comments."

logs.name: kind-depth
logs.text: "@simmered-jack, are you kidding me? You think you're some kind of comedian? Your attempt at humor fell flat and now you're just coming across as a sore loser. I was simply pointing out your tone and asking you to tone it down, not attacking you personally. Get over yourself."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@kind-depth, please maintain a respectful tone and avoid escalating the situation. Keep the discussion constructive."

logs.name: simmered-jack
logs.text: "Wow, thanks for the lecture, @kind-depth. I was just trying to bring some much-needed levity to this super serious and not-at-all-entitled discussion. I guess my'sore loser' comment was just a joke, but I'll make sure to keep my sense of humor in check... for now. Can we please just get back on topic? This conversation has been a real laugh riot so far."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@simmered-jack, let's focus on the topic and keep interactions respectful. Humor should enhance, not detract from, our discussions."
